mnemonics.title: ALU Functions
mnemonics.content: A Logical Unit (ALU) Does Arithmetic & Logic Using Many Transistors (AND, OR, NOT, XOR)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a hotel room selector - 3-digit code lights up one specific room
Picture a chessboard where adjacent cells differ by one bit

analogies.analogy: Like a TV remote selecting between HDMI inputs
Chess player anticipating moves ahead to speed up game
